subtitle: React Native (Expo) personal finance app — envelope budgeting, debt snowball, slip scanning, multi-household sync to Supabase.
remediatedNote: As-built score after QA Lead cycles + quality/security subagent reviews. Prior Jun-18 score (82/B) assumed fixes that red team disproved (RLS join-any-household, R2 snapshot guard, tombstone pipeline). Open Critical/High items remain in docs/queue.md (#41–#105); batch 1 (SEC-RT-001–005) in PR #106 targets first security tier.

dimensions.name: Security & secrets
dimensions.note: Weakest-link: SEC-RT-001/002 — any authenticated user can INSERT into household_members or user_households for any household (005:173-175, 002:17-18). Also High: PostgREST PATCH bypasses merge RPC guards (SEC-RT-003), invite abuse/brute-force (005/006), 018 completed-slip regression (SEC-RT-004). Fixed: notify-event IDOR, extract-slip auth, merge_slip_queue 017/018.

dimensions.name: Data integrity & sync
dimensions.note: Weakest-link: push-only sync with no PullService (QR-SYNC-001 Critical); LWW silent loss on counters (LWW-001–005); restore overwrites dirty rows (RESTORE-001–003); hard DELETE on push with no tombstone propagation (SOFTDEL-001–004, SyncOrchestrator:186). R2 snapshot guard NOT present — isSynced set without updated_at check (224-229). Overlapping sync dropped (QR-SYNC-002); batch limit 100 (QR-SYNC-003); DLQ silent (QR-SYNC-004).

dimensions.name: Architecture & code quality
dimensions.note: Clean Architecture boundaries; DIP on use cases; db.transaction() on create/delete transactions; ScreenErrorBoundary on navigators; instance-scoped sync orchestrator. Remaining: sync layer debt concentrated in RestoreService + SyncOrchestrator; constructor input pattern inconsistency (Low).

dimensions.name: Data layer
dimensions.note: Supabase: merge RPCs + RLS broadly present but membership policies broken (Critical). Missing restore indexes on transactions/envelopes (QR-DB-001); pending_sync queue index (QR-DB-002). Local SQLite: PRAGMA foreign_keys off (QR-DB-003). Migrations 016–018 shipped; 018 regressed slip overwrite guard.

dimensions.name: API & contracts
dimensions.note: Edge functions require auth; notify-event household + target-user checks. Gaps: notify-event payload validation (QR-API-001); Jest handler replicas drift from Deno prod (QR-API-002); direct table DML bypasses merge contracts (SEC-RT-003); deprecated FCM legacy API (SEC-RT-015).

dimensions.name: Testing & verifiability
dimensions.note: 236 suites / 2,013 tests; 89.4% lines / 78.2% branches. Strong unit breadth. Gaps: merge-rpc-contracts never exercises SyncOrchestrator (QR-TEST-001); notify-event replica skips auth paths (QR-TEST-002); mock-only babySteps integration (QR-TEST-005); no Detox on PR branches (QR-TEST-011); no sync property tests (QR-TEST-012).

dimensions.name: UX & accessibility
dimensions.note: Error banners on TransactionList, BusinessExpense, AddTransaction catch. Remaining: Budget/Dashboard/Forecast/SinkingFunds show empty state on hook error (QR-UX-001–004); MeterDashboard blank on failure (QR-UX-005); EnvelopeCard a11y labels (QR-UX-007); delete button below 24×24 (QR-UX-008).

dimensions.name: UI / code consistency
dimensions.note: Theme tokens adopted on primary flows; HeroSummaryCard migrated; FAB uses theme. Slip capture flow and less-trafficked screens still have occasional raw values.

critical.title: Any user can join any household via household_members INSERT (no invite check)
critical.impact: Full read/write access to any household's financial data

critical.title: Direct user_households INSERT grants access to any household
critical.impact: Bypasses membership model; enables unauthorized tenant access

critical.title: No incremental pull — multi-device / multi-member convergence fails
critical.impact: Other members' changes never reach local replicas after initial restore

critical.title: Sync R2: isSynced=true without updated_at snapshot guard
critical.impact: Edit-during-push can be marked synced and never retried

critical.title: Hard DELETE on sync push — no tombstone propagation
critical.impact: Deletes don't propagate; deleted rows can resurrect on restore

critical.title: Unauthenticated notify-event — arbitrary push to any user
Duplicate migration number 008 — deployment ordering undefined
critical.impact: Schema state depends on filesystem sort

fixes.title: notify-event: JWT auth + target user household membership (IDOR fix)
Migration 017 — restore merge_envelope columns, role guard, slip_queue schema
Migration 018 — slip_queue schema, user_households columns, notify hardening
Direction-independent LWW tiebreaker on merge RPCs (R3)
Comprehensive test suite +772 tests (236 suites, 89% coverage)
QA Cycle 1: 8 defects fixed; Cycle 2: zero new defects
Screen error handling + AddTransaction doSave catch
Snowball projector rewrite + meter duplicate-date guard
Android backup exclusion XMLs prevent D2D data leak

next: Block SEC-RT-001 + SEC-RT-002 immediately — restrict household_members/user_households INSERT to invite RPC path only.
SEC-RT-003 — REVOKE direct table DML for authenticated; route all writes through merge_* RPCs.
SEC-RT-004 — restore migration 007 completed-slip overwrite guard dropped in 018.
Tier 0 sync sprint: RESTORE-001 → SOFTDEL tombstones → LWW deltas → QR-SYNC-001 PullService.
Surface dead-letter queue to users (QR-SYNC-004); fix sync mutex + batch loop (QR-SYNC-002/003).
Test hardening: shared edge-function handlers + Detox smoke on PR (QR-TEST-002/011).
Pin GitHub Actions to commit SHAs (QR-CODE-001); migrate FCM to HTTP v1 (SEC-RT-015).
